titles.title: CliffordNumbers.jl: a Julia package for numeric primitives for geometry

citation.unstructured_citation: Die lineale Ausdehnungslehre ein neuer Zweig der Mathematik: dargestellt und durch Anwendungen auf die übrigen Zweige der Mathematik, wie auch auf die Statik, Mechanik, die Lehre vom Magnetismus und die Krystallonomie erläutert, Grassmann, H., Wissenschaft der extensiven Grösse, https://books.google.com/books?id=bKgAAAAAMAAJ, 1844, O. Wigand

Clifford Algebra to Geometric Calculus: A Unified Language for Mathematics and Physics, Hestenes, D. and Sobczyk, G., 9789400962927, 84008235, Fundamental Theories of Physics, https://books.google.com/books?id=8yVrCQAAQBAJ, 2012, Springer Netherlands

The Morgan Kaufmann Series in Computer Graphics, Geometric Algebra for Computer Science: An Object-Oriented Approach to Geometry, 978-0-08-055310-8, Geometric Algebra for Computer Science, https://geometricalgebra.org/, English, Morgan Kaufmann, Dorst, Leo and Fontijne, Daniel and Mann, Stephen, 2010
A Guided Tour to the Plane-Based Geometric Algebra PGA, https://bivector.net/PGA4CS.pdf, English, 2026-03-26, University of Amsterdam, Dorst, Leo and De Keninck, Steven, mar, 2022, 3

Pencils and Set Operators In 3D CGA, https://hal.science/hal-04569529, Geometric Algebra can be considered as a language that unifies mathematics, physics and computer sciences etc. Among other, CGA is of special interest for its powerful transformations and its ability to represent any hypersphere or hyperplane. Moreover, CGA is an algebra capable of representing pencils of spheres. This paper presents a reinterpretation of every objects of 3D CGA as pencils of spheres and introduces set operators on its elements (i.e. union, intersection, complement, etc). As an application, these operators are used to find the smallest tangent sphere of two skew lines., 2026-03-27, Chomicki, Clément and Breuils, Stéphane and Biri, Venceslas and Nozick, Vincent, may, 2024, Clifford Algebra, Conformal Geometric Algebra (CGA), Conformal Mapping, Geometric Algebra, Pencil, Skew Lines, working paper or preprint, HAL PDF Full Text:/home/brain/Zotero/storage/23UNKCXW/Chomicki et al. - 2024 - Pencils and Set Operators In 3D CGA.pdf:application/pdf, 5
Geometric Algebra for Physicists, Doran, C. and Lasenby, A., 9780521480222, 2008271629, https://books.google.com/books?id=2X3vAAAAMAAJ, 2007, Cambridge University Press
Clifford Algebras and Spinors, Lounesto, P., 9780521005517, 01025396, Cambridge Handbooks for Language Teachers, https://books.google.com/books?id=DTecU6UpkSgC, 2001, Cambridge University Press
